common__footer__tagline: Made in Barcelona and Amsterdam by people who cried at their own weddings.
common__footer__copyright: © 2026 Ovation Keepsakes, S.L. · All rights reserved.
event__messages__empty_hint: Share your QR code to get started
event__kiosk__device_tip: Use a tablet for the best experience
guest__recording__too_short: That was too short — try again?
guest__recording__mic_permission: We need access to your microphone
guest__recording__mic_denied: Microphone access was denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
guest__thank_you__message: Your message has been sent to {names}
account__delete_confirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
marketing__hero__description: Ovation is a keepsake app for the people you love most. Guests scan a QR code, leave a 30–90 second voice message and a photo. You open one every morning — for as long as you'd like.
marketing__hero__social_proof: {rating} ★ avg · read by couples on every anniversary
marketing__how__subtitle: Designed so your 82-year-old grandmother can leave a message without asking anyone for help.
marketing__how__step1_body: Pick your wedding date, add the couple names and a cover photo. We print a deck of elegant QR cards — one per table — and ship them in time.
marketing__how__step2_body: They scan, pick a language, and record 30–90 seconds. A photo snap goes with every message. No app to download. Works offline; syncs when reception returns.
marketing__how__step3_tag: For as long as you like
marketing__how__step3_body: After the wedding, your inbox fills over 30 days. Save favourites, order the Gold Book, or just revisit on anniversaries. Everything stays yours, forever.
marketing__how__step3_quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother in every turn. She would be so proud."
marketing__sample__description: Typed wedding guest books fill up with "Congrats!!" Ovation captures the tremor in your father's voice, your best friend laughing mid-sentence, your grandmother switching to her mother tongue. We transcribe and translate every message in 38 languages — you keep the original audio.
marketing__sample__entry_label: Entry № 47 · Mas de la Calma, Girona
marketing__sample__quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother — God rest her — in every turn. She would be so proud. I am so proud. Live long and argue well, hija."
marketing__sample__author_role: Grandmother of the bride · Recorded in Spanish
marketing__features__ritual_title: One message a morning, for a month after your wedding.
marketing__features__ritual_body: Messages unlock one per day — a gentle antidote to the post-wedding comedown.
marketing__features__lang_title: 6 languages, preserved in the original voice.
marketing__features__privacy_title: Only you and your partner see anything. Ever.
marketing__features__privacy_detail: End-to-end encrypted · GDPR · EU data residency
marketing__features__qr_title: Letterpress QR cards, free shipping worldwide.
marketing__features__planner_eyebrow: For the people who plan it
marketing__features__planner_title: A tiny QR stand for every table, a dashboard for your planner.
marketing__features__planner_body: One-click sync with your registry & guest list. Planners get a co-pilot seat.
marketing__testimonial__quote: "We listened to my late father's message on our first anniversary, in the kitchen, at midnight. I don't know another product that has earned me that moment."
marketing__pricing__subtitle: Pay once. No subscriptions. No per-message fees. Messages are yours, forever.
marketing__pricing__essential_desc: Up to 40 guests. All core features, QR cards not included.
marketing__pricing__keepsake_desc: Everything in Essential, plus the things that make Ovation feel like an heirloom.
marketing__pricing__gold_desc: Keepsake plus the physical book — 180 letterpressed pages, bound in linen.
marketing__pricing__gold_feats__the_gold: The Gold Book (180 pp, linen bound)
marketing__faq__subtitle: Something missing? We answer every email within 4 hours — even on weekends, because weddings happen on weekends.
marketing__faq__q1: How does Ovation actually work on the wedding day?
marketing__faq__a1: We ship you a deck of letterpressed QR cards — one per table, plus a few for the bar. Guests scan with any phone, pick a language, record 30–90 seconds and snap a photo. No app to download. Works on iOS, Android, and any browser from the last 8 years.
marketing__faq__q2: What about guests who are not tech-savvy, or elderly?
marketing__faq__a2: The record screen is one button. Typography is 28px minimum. Uncles, aunts and grandmothers make up ~40% of our messages — by design.
marketing__faq__q3: Can guests leave messages before the wedding?
marketing__faq__a3: Yes. Open the book 4 weeks before. We send gentle nudges if you want.
marketing__faq__q4: How long do you keep the audio?
marketing__faq__a4: Forever. Original WAV files, stored on EU servers, downloadable anytime as a .zip. No monthly fees.
marketing__faq__q5: Can we get a physical book?
marketing__faq__a5: The Gold Book plan includes a 180-page linen-bound volume, letterpressed, with transcripts + favourite photos + QR codes to play back each voice. Most couples order 3 copies.
marketing__faq__a6: Only the couple accounts can see anything. Messages are end-to-end encrypted. We never train models on your data. GDPR-compliant, EU-resident.
marketing__cta__description: Set-up takes 10 minutes. Free forever on the Essential plan. Upgrade when your guest list is final — or never. The book is yours either way.
marketing__cta__disclaimer: No credit card required · cancel anytime
kiosk__welcome: Leave a message for the happy couple
kiosk__offline: Offline — messages will sync when reconnected

kiosk__hero__subtitle: Set a device on a stand at the venue. Guests tap, record, and done — no app, no scanning. Locked down so nobody can wander off into your photos.
kiosk__hero__status_lead: Start the kiosk from the device you'll use at the venue.
kiosk__hero__qr_hint: Or scan your event QR on the device you'll use — it'll open kiosk instantly.

kiosk__preview__no_event: Set up your event to see a live kiosk preview here.

guest__thank_you__caption: Your contribution stays private to the couple. We never share guest messages with third parties.

checkout__cancel__body: You stepped away before completing payment, so nothing was billed. Your draft order #{id} stays available — pick it back up whenever you're ready.
keepsakes__hero__subtitle: Pick what speaks to you — we print, press, and ship. Every keepsake is built from the messages and photos your guests have already given you.
keepsakes__bundle__title: Gold Book + Thank-You Cards + Digital Album for <emph>€149</emph>
keepsakes__testimonial__1__quote: The book arrived and we both cried. Again.
keepsakes__testimonial__2__quote: Playing the vinyl at our 1-year anniversary was wild.
keepsakes__testimonial__3__quote: Every guest asked where we got the cards.
keepsakes__footer__caption: Every keepsake is carbon-neutral · printed in Portugal · shipped worldwide
kiosk__config__what_section__desc: Pick one or more. Audio is the magic; a photo is the cherry.
kiosk__config__what__audio__desc: 60–90 seconds by default. Waveform preview while recording.
kiosk__config__what__photo__desc: Front camera, one tap. Optional — they can skip.
kiosk__config__what__video__desc: Landscape video up to 60 seconds. Off by default — big uploads.
kiosk__config__time_section__desc: Keep them tight — the best messages are short.
kiosk__config__time__return__desc: After the guest sends their message. Keeps the line moving.
kiosk__config__lockdown_section__desc: Nobody should be able to scroll your camera roll.
kiosk__config__lockdown__fullscreen__des: Hides the browser chrome. Requires three-finger press + passcode to exit.
kiosk__config__lockdown__guided__desc: iPhone: Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access. Android: pin-a-screen in task switcher.
kiosk__config__lockdown__pin__desc: Four digits. So a curious guest can't get out.
kiosk__config__lockdown__airplane__desc: Warn us if the device goes offline so we can save messages locally.
kiosk__config__welcome_section__desc: What guests see before they tap record.
kiosk__config__welcome__note_placeholder: Hola! Bienvenue. Leave us a message — a story, a song, a bad dance move. We'll cherish it.
kiosk__config__welcome__photo__desc: Faded into the background behind your names.
kiosk__config__welcome__lang_picker__des: Let guests switch before recording. We detect their device language first.
kiosk__config__welcome__chime__desc: A soft chime plays when a guest taps record. Friendly and clear.
kiosk__config__languages_section__desc: The main one is shown first. Add any your guests speak.
kiosk__config__offline_section__desc: Venue WiFi dies. We planned for it.
kiosk__config__offline__store__desc: Messages save to the device and sync the moment WiFi is back.
kiosk__config__offline__storage__desc: Roughly 200 audio messages at 90s each. You'll be fine.
kiosk__config__offline__notify__title: Notify us if sync falls behind
kiosk__config__offline__notify__desc: Email and push, if more than 20 messages are queued.
help__hero__subtitle: Quick answers, step-by-step guides, and a way to reach a human when you need one.
help__resource__guide__desc: Everything from setup to keepsakes, in plain English.
help__resource__videos__desc: Watch short tutorials for the trickiest parts.
help__resource__chat__desc: Mon–Fri, 9–18 CET. Average reply under 5 minutes.
help__resource__email__desc: We reply within 24 hours, weekends included.
help__faq__subtitle: Tap a question to expand the answer.
help__faq__getting_started__a: Create your event from the home page, set your couple names and wedding date, then share the link or QR code with guests. The kiosk and direct-link flows both work out of the box.
help__faq__kiosk_mode__a: Open Quick links → Kiosk on your tablet, hit Start kiosk on this device, and the screen locks into a guest-friendly welcome view. Set a 4-digit PIN in Lockdown to prevent guests from exiting.
help__faq__qr_code__q: Where do I find the QR code?
help__faq__qr_code__a: Quick links → QR code. Download as PNG or SVG, print it, and place it next to your kiosk or on table cards.
help__faq__languages__q: Can guests submit in different languages?
help__faq__languages__a: Yes. Add languages on the kiosk page. Guests can switch from the welcome screen if you enable the language picker.
help__faq__messages_storage__a: Storage depends on your plan. You'll see the expiry date on each event. Renew or upgrade from Settings to extend it.
help__faq__keepsakes__a: Production starts when you confirm the order. Lead times vary per product (3–45 days) and are shown on each keepsake page.
help__faq__billing__q: How do I change billing or cancel?
help__faq__billing__a: Settings → Account → Billing. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. Refunds follow our 14-day policy.
help__contact__body: If you can't find what you need, drop us a line. Real people, real answers — no chatbot maze.
kiosk__exit__hint: Enter the 4-digit PIN to leave kiosk mode.
settings__privacy__subtitle: Control who can see your book, who can leave messages, and who can see them. Defaults are private — change only what you want to open up.
settings__privacy__visibility__private__: Only you, your partner, and invited guests can see anything.
settings__privacy__visibility__unlisted_: Anyone with the link can view — but it won't appear in search.
settings__privacy__visibility__public__d: Discoverable in Ovation's gallery of wedding books (curated, opt-in).
settings__privacy__senders__invited__des: Only people who scanned a QR card you sent, or used your invite link.
settings__privacy__senders__anyone__desc: Useful if you're sharing over WhatsApp or Instagram.
settings__privacy__senders__signin__desc: Guests enter their email before leaving a message. Catches pranksters.
settings__privacy__review__before__desc: Every message waits in your queue until you approve it. Turn off for a more live feel.
settings__privacy__review__autopublish__: Messages from guests you tagged as 'family' skip the queue.
settings__privacy__what_guests__desc: Controls what a guest sees when they visit your public link.
settings__privacy__what_guests__count__d: A "142 messages from 88 guests" stat on the welcome screen.
settings__privacy__what_guests__others__: Lets guests browse what others left (after yours is recorded).
settings__privacy__what_guests__contribu: A read-only list. Only visible to co-owners by default.
settings__privacy__ai__transcribe__desc: We use on-device speech recognition. Transcripts never leave your book.
settings__privacy__ai__guest_see__desc: Guests can correct their own transcript before submitting.
settings__privacy__ai__suggestions__desc: Claude can propose thank-you notes and book layouts. Off means pure manual.
settings__data__subtitle: Your messages belong to you. Download everything anytime — audio, transcripts, photos, metadata.
settings__data__hero__body: All messages, hours of audio, photos, full JSON metadata. Arrives in your email within 10 minutes.
settings__data__individual__pdf__desc: Your current Gold Book draft · print-ready 300 dpi
settings__data__individual__guests__desc: CSV with contact info + contribution status
settings__data__past__expiry_note: Download links expire after 7 days for your security.
settings__data__rights__desc: Under GDPR & CCPA. For requests on behalf of a deceased partner, contact support.
settings__data__rights__report__desc: A PDF summary of everything we know about you and your book. Takes up to 72 hours.
settings__data__rights__optout__title: Ask us to stop using your data for service improvement
settings__data__rights__optout__desc: We use anonymized patterns to tune transcription and layout. Opt out any time.
marketing__showpiece__quote: “You’ve built something so beautiful together — watching you both today, I kept thinking how lucky I am to call you my dearest friend.”
auth__signup__countdown__hint: Plenty of time to gather voices.
auth__signin__welcome__body_voices_full: Gathering <voices>{voicesCount} new voices</voices>, <photos>{photosCount} new photos</photos>, and queueing them the way you left them.
auth__signin__twofactor__body_full: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone. It expires in <timer>4:52</timer>.
qr_code__share__email_subject: A voice message for our wedding book
qr_code__share__suggested_a: “Hi! Would you record a short voice message for our wedding book? Scan the code or tap —
qr_code__order__body: Hand-printed in Lisbon. Ships to Girona in 5–7 days.
qr_cards_order__qty__body: One card per guest is our rule of thumb. Order 10% extra for replacements and save-the-dates.
qr_cards_order__design__body: Your cover, date, and URL are pulled from your book — change them below and the proof updates live.
qr_cards_order__design__confirm_proof: I've double-checked the names, date, and URL. I understand the proof is final once I approve.
qr_cards_order__shipping__phone_help: We only use this if the courier needs to reach you.
qr_cards_order__payment__save_card: Save this card for future orders
qr_cards_order__payment__stripe_note: Your payment is processed by Stripe. Ovation never stores your card number.
qr_cards_order__confirm__body: We've sent a receipt to your email.
photos__filter__pair_body: {count} photos still unmatched — tap to review suggestions.
photos__toolbar__subtitle: From 14 Jun — 15 Jun · 42 paired with messages · 22 unmatched
guests__nudge__title: Nudge {count} guests who haven’t recorded yet
guests__nudge__body: We’ll send a warm one-liner with your link. You can preview and edit before anything goes out. WhatsApp works best — 3× the response rate of email.
guests__nudge__preview_body: “Hi Renée — Lena & Tomás here. The book is closing soon; would love a quick voice note. 30 seconds is plenty. ovation.love/lena-tomas”
guests__thankyou__body: Pre-addressed postcards with each guest’s own photo and a quote they said. We print, stamp, and ship.
keepsakes__footer__legal: Every keepsake is carbon-neutral · printed in Portugal · shipped worldwide
auth__social__error_default: Couldn’t start sign-in. Please try again.
guests__select_all: Select all guests on this page
guests__directory__empty_body: No guests yet — once messages start arriving, contributors will show up here.
keepsakes__design__fallback__headline: A piece of the day, kept.
keepsakes__design__gold_book__tagline: A printed hardcover with every guest message, photo, and transcript.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__headli: Their words. Their faces. One reel.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__taglin: A 3-minute film stitched from every voice and photo your guests left.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__headline: Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__tagline: A real 12" record from your guest audio. Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__digital_album__taglin: A living album guests can revisit. Share a single link — plays on any device.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__head: Say thanks — in their own photo.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__tagl: Each card features the guest’s own photo and a snippet of what they said.
keepsakes__design__canvas_print__tagline: One favourite quote, typeset on archival canvas. Ready to hang.
marketing__gold_book__description: The Gold Book is a premium printed record of every message your guests left — transcribed, translated into English, and laid out beautifully. Each spread includes a QR code that plays the original audio.
marketing__gold_book__feature1_body: Enough room for every voice, with room to breathe.
marketing__gold_book__feature2_body: Feels like the heirloom it will become.
marketing__gold_book__feature3_body: Scan any page to hear the voice behind the words.
marketing__gold_book__feature4_body: Every message transcribed and translated automatically.
marketing__gold_book__ships: Ships in 14 days · Free EU delivery
marketing__changelog__description: Every update, every improvement — shipped with care.
marketing__for_planners__description: Wedding planners who partner with Ovation give every couple a voice-first guest book — no hardware, no app downloads, no friction. You focus on the day. We capture the words.
marketing__for_planners__benefit1_body: Earn a percentage on every Gold Book and keepsake ordered through your events.
marketing__for_planners__benefit2_body: Manage QR codes, guestlinks, and orders across all your events in one place.
marketing__for_planners__benefit3_body: Offer Ovation under your own brand with a custom domain and logo.
marketing__for_planners__benefit4_body: Dedicated onboarding and a direct line for day-of questions.
marketing__about__description: Ovation started with a voice note. One of our founders recorded a message at a friend's wedding, watched it get lost in a WhatsApp group, and thought: this deserved better. We built Ovation to make sure every voice finds its way home.
marketing__about__mission: To preserve the voices that matter most — not as text, not as photos, but as the sound of someone saying I love you in their own voice, in their own language, in the moment they meant it.
marketing__about__team_description: We are a small, international team who have attended more weddings than we can count and cried at most of them.
marketing__careers__description: We are a small team building something that matters. We work remotely across Europe, ship often, and believe deeply that the words people say at weddings deserve to outlast the flowers.
marketing__careers__value1_body: We have no fixed office. Our team is spread across Barcelona, Amsterdam, and London.
marketing__careers__value2_body: We move fast and trust each other. No bureaucracy, no endless reviews.
marketing__careers__value3_body: Every pixel, every line of copy, every feature gets the attention it deserves.
marketing__careers__value4_body: We build things that matter to real people on the most important days of their lives.
marketing__careers__no_openings: No open positions right now — but we are always interested in hearing from exceptional people.
marketing__sustainability__description: A keepsake should last generations. So should the planet it was made on. Here is how we try to get both right.
marketing__sustainability__commitment1_b: Every Gold Book is printed on paper from responsibly managed forests, certified by the Forest Stewardship Council.
marketing__sustainability__commitment2_b: We offset 100% of the carbon from every shipment through verified reforestation projects.
marketing__sustainability__commitment3_b: No inventory, no waste. Every book is printed only when ordered.
marketing__sustainability__commitment4_b: We build for heirlooms, not for landfill. Linen covers, archival-quality inks, lay-flat binding.
marketing__sustainability__footer_note: We are not perfect. But we are honest about where we are and serious about where we are going.
marketing__press_kit__description: Everything you need to write about Ovation — boilerplate, brand assets, and a direct line to our press contact.
marketing__press_kit__boilerplate: Ovation is a wedding guest message platform that captures voice and video messages from guests, transcribes and translates them in 38 languages, and produces a premium printed Gold Book keepsake. Founded in 2024 and based in Barcelona and Amsterdam.
marketing__press_kit__assets_description: Logos in SVG and PNG, brand colours, and approved photography.
marketing__contact__title: We would love to hear from you.
marketing__contact__description: Questions, feedback, press, partnerships — reach us at the address below and we will reply within one business day.
marketing__dpa__subtitle: For wedding planners and professional event coordinators
marketing__changelog__entry1_description: Kiosk mode. Set up a tablet at your venue and let guests record without needing a QR code link.
marketing__changelog__entry2_description: Gold Book redesign. New lay-flat binding, updated typography, and 12 new cover options in linen and vegan leather.
marketing__changelog__entry3_description: 38-language translation. Every voice message is now automatically transcribed and translated into English, with the original preserved.
marketing__changelog__entry4_description: Ovation launches. Voice messages, photo uploads, and the first Gold Books ship to couples in Spain and the Netherlands.
marketing__keepsakes__description: From printed Gold Books to vinyl records and canvas prints — every format designed to make your guests' words last a lifetime.
marketing__keepsakes__product1_descripti: The complete record of every voice, beautifully printed.
marketing__keepsakes__product2_descripti: Your favourite messages cut to a 7" vinyl record.
marketing__keepsakes__product3_descripti: A 3-minute film of your guests' video messages.
marketing__keepsakes__product4_descripti: Instant access to all messages, photos, and transcripts.
marketing__keepsakes__product5_descripti: Personalised cards with a printed quote from a guest message.
marketing__keepsakes__product6_descripti: A single message, printed large on museum-quality canvas.
marketing__keepsakes__shipping_note: All physical products ship within 14 days. Free delivery within the EU.
marketing__privacy__section1_body: Ovation Keepsakes, S.L. operates the Ovation guest messaging platform at ovation.wedding. We are a data controller registered in Spain. Our registered office is at Carrer de Provença 123, 08036 Barcelona, Spain. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and your rights in relation to it.
marketing__privacy__section2_body: We collect information you give us directly, such as your name and email address when you register, and the event details you provide when setting up a wedding page. We also collect information submitted by your guests, including their names, voice recordings, video recordings, and photographs. Additionally, we collect technical data automatically when you use our platform, such as your IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and pages visited.
marketing__privacy__section3_body: We use your personal data to provide and improve our service, process your orders and payments, send you service-related communications, and respond to your enquiries. We use guest recordings and photographs to transcribe, translate, and compile the Gold Book and other keepsake products you order. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
marketing__privacy__section4_body: We share your data with service providers who help us operate our platform, including cloud hosting providers, transcription and translation services, payment processors, and print-on-demand fulfilment partners. All providers are bound by data processing agreements. We may also disclose data where required by law.
marketing__privacy__section5_body: We use essential cookies to operate our platform, analytical cookies to understand how visitors use our site, and marketing cookies where you have given consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our cookie settings.
marketing__privacy__section6_body: We keep account data for as long as your account is active and for up to 12 months after you close it. Guest recordings and photos are retained for the duration of your subscription and deleted within 90 days of account closure. Financial records are retained for 7 years as required by applicable tax law.
marketing__privacy__section7_body: Depending on where you are located, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, to restrict or object to processing, and to withdraw consent at any time. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link>. We will respond within 30 days.
marketing__privacy__section8_body: For privacy-related enquiries, write to us at <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link> or at our registered office: Ovation Keepsakes, S.L., Carrer de Provença 123, 08036 Barcelona, Spain.
marketing__terms__section1_body: By creating an account or using the Ovation platform, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use our service. These Terms apply to all users, including couples, guests, and wedding planners. Ovation Keepsakes, S.L. reserves the right to update these Terms at any time; continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
marketing__terms__section2_body: Ovation provides a platform for collecting voice and video messages from wedding guests, transcribing and translating them, and producing printed keepsake products. We offer the service on a subscription and per-product basis. Feature availability depends on the plan you have selected. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time with reasonable notice.
marketing__terms__section3_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering.
marketing__terms__section4_body: You retain ownership of any content you or your guests submit through Ovation, including voice recordings, photographs, and written messages. By submitting content, you grant Ovation a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to store, process, and display that content solely for the purpose of providing the service.
marketing__terms__section5_body: Subscription fees are charged in advance on a monthly or annual basis. Physical products are charged at the time of order. All prices are in EUR and include VAT where applicable. Printed products that have entered production cannot be cancelled. Disputes should be raised at <link>support@ovation.wedding</link>.
marketing__terms__section6_body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Ovation is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of data or recordings. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid to Ovation in the 12 months preceding the claim.
marketing__terms__section7_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Barcelona, except where mandatory consumer protection law in your country of residence provides otherwise.
marketing__cookies__section1_body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and understand how you interact with the site. We use cookies and similar technologies on the Ovation platform.
marketing__cookies__section2_essential_b: are strictly necessary for the platform to function. They manage your login session, store your preferences, and protect against cross-site request forgery. You cannot opt out of essential cookies.
marketing__cookies__section2_analytics_b: help us understand how visitors interact with our platform by collecting anonymised information. We use this data to improve the service. Analytics cookies are set only with your consent.
marketing__cookies__section2_marketing_b: may be set by our advertising partners to measure the effectiveness of campaigns. These cookies are set only with your explicit consent.
marketing__cookies__section3_body: You can update your cookie preferences at any time using our cookie settings panel. You may also control cookies through your browser settings. For questions, contact us at <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link>.
marketing__gdpr__section1_body: Ovation Keepsakes, S.L. is committed to protecting the personal data of every individual whose information we process. This document explains how we comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 in our role as a data controller for couples and guests who use our platform.
marketing__gdpr__section2_intro: We process the following categories of personal data in connection with our service:
marketing__gdpr__section2_item1_text: names provided by guests when leaving a message, and names of the couple who create an Ovation event.
marketing__gdpr__section2_item2_text: email addresses of registered users (couples and planners).
marketing__gdpr__section2_item3_text: audio and video messages submitted by guests, which may contain voice biometric data and personal statements.
marketing__gdpr__section2_item4_text: machine-generated text derived from voice recordings.
marketing__gdpr__section2_item5_text: photographs uploaded by guests as part of their message submission.
marketing__gdpr__section2_item6_text: IP addresses, browser types, session identifiers, and interaction logs collected automatically.
marketing__gdpr__section2_item7_text: billing information processed by our payment provider, Stripe. We do not store full card numbers.
marketing__gdpr__section3_intro: We rely on the following legal bases under Article 6 GDPR:
marketing__gdpr__section3_item1_text: processing necessary to perform our service agreement with registered couples and planners.
marketing__gdpr__section3_item2_text: processing of guest voice recordings and photographs, where guests explicitly agree before proceeding.
marketing__gdpr__section3_item3_text: security monitoring, fraud prevention, and service analytics, balanced against data subject rights.
marketing__gdpr__section3_item4_text: retaining financial records as required by applicable tax law.
marketing__gdpr__section4_body: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request erasure where processing is no longer necessary, restrict processing, receive your data in a portable format, and object to processing based on legitimate interests. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link>. We will respond within 30 days.
marketing__gdpr__section5_body: Our infrastructure is hosted within the European Economic Area. Where we engage sub-processors located outside the EEA, we ensure adequate safeguards are in place — including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission — before any transfer takes place.
marketing__gdpr__section6_body: We retain account data for as long as your account is active, and for up to 12 months after deletion. Guest voice recordings and photos are retained for the duration of the couple's subscription and deleted within 90 days of account closure. Financial records are retained for 7 years as required by Spanish tax law.
marketing__gdpr__section7_body: Our data protection contact is reachable at <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link>. Our registered address is Ovation Keepsakes, S.L., Carrer de Provença 123, 08036 Barcelona, Spain. If you believe we have not adequately addressed your concern, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish data protection authority (AEPD).
marketing__dpa__section1_body: This Data Processing Agreement is entered into between Ovation Keepsakes, S.L. ("Processor") and the wedding planner or professional event coordinator ("Controller") who has accepted our Planner Partner Terms. This DPA governs the processing of personal data carried out by the Processor on behalf of the Controller.
marketing__dpa__section2_body: The Processor processes personal data solely to provide the Ovation guest messaging service on events managed by the Controller. The categories of data subjects are wedding guests, couples, and other individuals who interact with an Ovation event link created by the Controller. Personal data processed includes names, voice recordings, video recordings, photographs, and email addresses.
marketing__dpa__section3_body: The Processor shall process personal data only on documented instructions from the Controller; ensure authorised persons have committed to confidentiality; implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures; not engage sub-processors without prior written authorisation; and delete or return all personal data upon termination of the agreement.
marketing__dpa__section4_body: The Controller grants general written authorisation for the Processor to engage sub-processors. The Processor maintains a current list of sub-processors at ovation.wedding/sub-processors and will notify the Controller of any intended changes at least 14 days in advance.
marketing__dpa__section5_body: The Processor shall promptly notify the Controller of any request received directly from a data subject and shall not respond to such requests itself, except where instructed by the Controller or required by law.
marketing__dpa__section6_body: The Processor implements encryption of personal data in transit (TLS 1.2 or higher) and at rest (AES-256); access controls limiting data access to authorised personnel; regular security assessments; and a documented incident response procedure. The Processor will notify the Controller of any personal data breach within 48 hours of becoming aware of it.
marketing__dpa__section7_body: This DPA is effective from the date the Controller accepts the Planner Partner Terms and remains in force as long as the Processor processes personal data on behalf of the Controller. Upon termination, the Processor shall delete or return all personal data within 30 days. For questions, contact <link>privacy@ovation.wedding</link>.
